---
title: "Drought Monitoring with GEE AI Assistant & Gemini API"
date: "2025-07-26"
description: "Exploring the transformation of geospatial analysis using the GEE AI Assistant and Gemini API at GDG for Earth Engine Nairobi."
image: "../images/gdg.jpg"
categories: [Past]
---

**Topic:** Drought Monitoring with Google Earth Engine AI Assistant-Powered by Gemini API  
**Host:** GDG for Earth Engine Nairobi  
**Date:** July 26, 2025  
**Key Themes:** AI, Build with AI

## About this Event

Join us as we explore how the **GEE AI Assistant**, a powerful browser extension, is transforming the way we conduct geospatial analysis. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced practitioner, this tool helps you:

✅ **Instantly generate and debug scripts**  
✅ **Translate code** between JavaScript and Python  
✅ **Build full-featured GEE Apps**  
✅ **Extract statistics**, create charts, and export results  
✅ **Interact with Earth Engine** in your native language using multi-language prompts

All of this happens seamlessly within the Earth Engine Code Editor through an intuitive side panel—bringing the power of AI directly into your workflow.

---

[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> View Event Details](https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-presentation-ctnr"></i> Slides](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/publications.html){.social-btn}
